patch.value: Add pm package / pm packages shell completion (bash/zsh/fish), including the package-only --declarative flag

src/cli/commands/completion.ts only emits a lifecycle completion block for `pm extension` (bash `extension)` case, zsh `extension)` case, fish `__fish_seen_subcommand_from extension`). There is NO completion block for `pm package` / `pm packages`, so the package lifecycle command (the primary package-mode authoring entry per docs/SDK.md) has never had shell completion. Surfaced in PR #359 review (Gemini): after scoping `--declarative` to package mode, it was removed from the extension completion (correct — `pm extension init` no longer accepts it) but there is no package completion to carry it. Fix: add `package`/`packages` lifecycle completion blocks mirroring the extension block across bash/zsh/fish, including the package-only `--declarative` flag, and assert them in completion-command.spec.ts. Pre-existing gap, scoped out of #359 to keep that PR focused on the declarative capability matrix.
